title: FOOD PANTRY AND EMERGENCY SERVICES - 211info
text: NEIGHBORHOOD CENTER OF SOUTH MORROW COUNTY FOOD PANTRY AND EMERGENCY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Food pantry provides a 3-5 day supply of food. 441 N Main Street Heppner, OR 97836 Eligibility: Households at or below 300% of the Federal Poverty Line (FPL) Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (541) 676-5024 Get Directions Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 676-5024 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: South Morrow County (Cities of Hardman, Heppner, Ione, and Lexington) Services: Bedding/Linen Food Pantries General Clothing Provision Other Services Offered At This Location: UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEIGHBORHOOD CENTER OF SOUTH MORROW COUNTY
